title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO CALANUTAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ROSA-LES, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, TO DON FELIX COLOMA.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2103 / 68 OG No. 41, 8000-G (October 9, 1972)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6431, June 17, 1972 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO CALANUTAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ROSA-LES, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, TO DON FELIX COLOMA.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Barrio Calanutan int he Municipality of Rosales, Province of Pangasinan is hereby changed to Don Felix Coloma.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 17, 1972.
